creator: bugzilla@ChrisBowman.com
text:
The man page for gpiobus references several devices that can be added to the kernel for the ARM architecture.  One of them is device zy7_gpio.  When I try to compile an ARM kernel with this device I get the following error:

config: Error: device "zy7_gpio" is unknown

I believe this is on a 13.0 release src tree.
